---
title: "test_annex_preservation_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_annex_preservation_empire.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.65
style_score: 3.45
intel_score: 5.40
overall_score: 4.52
---

## Intent
The `test_annex_preservation_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_annex_preservation_checkmarks. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_annex_preservation_checkmarks. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.annex](file://src.core.annex)

### Exports
- `test_annex_preservation_checkmarks`
